intelligence.currentFocus: Session 82 closed out: 6 Genius Hit List items shipped at quality bar. CI root-cause fix migrated Lighthouse + playwright-axe to scripts/local-preview-server.mjs on 127.0.0.1:4173 — Cloudflare WAF was serving managed-challenge HTML to GitHub Actions runner IPs (that's why Lighthouse wait-on timed out and axe's --text/--bg contrast collapsed to NaN on 18 tests). Homepage noscript fallbacks + 4s JS-hydration-timeout toast completed the S80 Tier 1 partial. Hero-story contrast boosted (color var(--text), darker bg, gold strong, explicit light-mode dark-panel override). Lighthouse budgets tightened to Perf 0.85 / A11y 0.95 / BP 0.90 / SEO 0.95. will-change on forge-letter + forge-spark-burst. Keyboard-accessible mega-dropdowns via nav-toggle.js rewrite (aria-haspopup/expanded/controls, arrow-key cycling, ESC, focusout collapse); fingerprinted shell rebuilt (nav-toggle.shell-8a1b93790f.js, 76 HTML files updated).
intelligence.nextMilestone: Confirm post-push Lighthouse + playwright-axe runs are green with the new local-preview runtime and tightened budgets. If first Lighthouse run is red, iterate budget once rather than relaxing target. Then resume Tier 2 depth work: Ask IGNIS concierge, /membership/ testimonials, /social/ aggregation, Forge Feed. CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN is still the highest-leverage single blocker for Tier 1 infrastructure items.
